description: Machine-executable fix strategies for the remediation agent. Each entry defines action_type and action config. The agent reads and executes these directly — no Python fix logic lives outside this file.

action_types.advisory: Log a message and return a configurable success value. Never blocks.
action_types.cli_command: Run a single CLI command. Args are a JSON list with {param} placeholders.
action_types.cli_sequence: Run ordered steps. Each step is type 'command' (list) or 'shell' (script string/array joined with newline and run via sh -c).
action_types.kubectl_patch: Run oc/kubectl patch. Patch body and type are defined in the action object.

backoff_and_retry.name: Backoff and Retry
backoff_and_retry.description: Advisory: log recommended wait time for rate-limited operations. Non-blocking.

action.message: Rate limit detected: wait {backoff_seconds}s before retrying (max {max_retries} retries)

refresh_ocm_token.name: Refresh OCM Token
refresh_ocm_token.description: Advisory: OCM credentials need manual refresh — cannot be automated.

action.message: OCM token refresh requires manual intervention — update credentials and retry

log_and_continue.name: Log and Continue
log_and_continue.description: Log the issue for review and continue test execution.

action.message: Issue logged for review — test execution continues

manual_cloudformation_cleanup.name: Manual CloudFormation Cleanup
manual_cloudformation_cleanup.description: Advisory: flag a CloudFormation stack for operator review.

increase_timeout_and_monitor.name: Increase Timeout and Monitor
increase_timeout_and_monitor.description: Advisory: recommend increasing timeout for slow operations.

action.message: Recommend increasing timeout by {suggested_timeout_increase} for this operation

install_capi_capa.name: Verify CAPI/CAPA Installation
install_capi_capa.description: Check that CAPI and CAPA controller deployments exist in their namespaces.

action.success_message: CAPI/CAPA controllers verified — both namespaces reachable

retry_cloudformation_delete.name: Retry CloudFormation Stack Deletion
retry_cloudformation_delete.description: Clean up VPC blocking dependencies (endpoints, ENIs, security groups) then retry stack deletion.

steps.name: verify_stack_state
shell: echo "$STATUS" | grep -qi 'does not exist' && echo 'Stack {stack_name} already deleted' && exit 0

steps.name: delete_vpc_endpoints
shell: [ -z "$VPC_ID" ] || ! echo "$VPC_ID" | grep -q '^vpc-' && echo 'No VPC found in stack' && exit 0
echo 'Waiting 20s for ENIs to release after endpoint deletion'

steps.name: delete_enis
shell: [ -z "$VPC_ID" ] || ! echo "$VPC_ID" | grep -q '^vpc-' && echo 'No VPC found, skipping ENI cleanup' && exit 0
aws ec2 delete-network-interface --region {region} --network-interface-id "$ENI_ID" && echo "Deleted ENI $ENI_ID" || echo "Could not delete ENI $ENI_ID"

steps.name: delete_security_groups
shell: [ -z "$VPC_ID" ] || ! echo "$VPC_ID" | grep -q '^vpc-' && echo 'No VPC found, skipping SG cleanup' && exit 0
echo "Cleaning non-default security groups in VPC $VPC_ID"
aws ec2 delete-security-group --region {region} --group-id "$SG_ID" && echo "Deleted SG $SG_ID" || echo "Could not delete SG $SG_ID (may have dependencies)"

steps.name: retry_stack_deletion
shell: [ "$NEW_STATUS" = 'DELETE_FAILED' ] && echo 'Stack re-entered DELETE_FAILED -- dependencies may remain' && exit 1
echo 'Stack {stack_name} is DELETE_IN_PROGRESS -- VPC cleanup should unblock it'

action.success_message: CloudFormation stack {stack_name} cleanup and retry complete
action.failure_message: Failed to clean up or retry CloudFormation stack {stack_name}

cleanup_vpc_dependencies.name: Clean Up VPC Dependencies
cleanup_vpc_dependencies.description: Remove ENIs and security groups tagged with the cluster ID that are blocking VPC deletion.

steps.name: delete_tagged_enis
shell: echo "Cleaning tagged ENIs in VPC $VPC_ID for cluster $CLUSTER_ID"
if [ -z "$ENI_IDS" ]; then echo 'No tagged ENIs found' && exit 0; fi
aws ec2 delete-network-interface --region $REGION --network-interface-id "$ENI_ID" && echo "Deleted ENI $ENI_ID" || echo "Could not delete ENI $ENI_ID"

steps.name: delete_tagged_security_groups
shell: echo "Cleaning tagged security groups in VPC $VPC_ID for cluster $CLUSTER_ID"
if [ -z "$SG_IDS" ]; then echo 'No tagged security groups found' && exit 0; fi
aws ec2 delete-security-group --region $REGION --group-id "$SG_ID" && echo "Deleted SG $SG_ID" || echo "Could not delete SG $SG_ID (may have remaining dependencies)"
echo "Security group cleanup done for VPC $VPC_ID"

action.failure_message: Failed to clean up VPC {vpc_id} dependencies
